languages.text: "Омниссия благословит! Возрадуемся, ибо вероятность, в которой археотех был утрачен, миновала нас! Исход признан наиболее благополучным. Передаю предложение о пакте сотрудничества ТР-2, согласно которому владение священным археотехом перейдет к обители Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17".

"Omnissiah's blessings! Let us rejoice, for the probability in which the archeotech was lost has passed! The outcome is recognised as most favourable. Transmitting a proposal for cooperation pact TR-2, in accordance with which possession of the sacred archeotech will pass to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
languages.original_text: "Омниссия благословит! Возрадуемся, ибо вероятность, в которой археотех был утрачен, миновала нас! Исход признан наиболее благополучным. Передаю предложение о пакте сотрудничества ТР-2, согласно которому владение священным археотехом перейдет к обители Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17".

Transmitting a proposal for cooperation pact TR-2, in accordance with which possession of the sacred archeotech will pass to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

languages.text: 「オムニシアの祝福あれ！アーケオテクノロジーが失われた可能性は過ぎ去った。この結果、最も有利な結果となった。聖なるアーケオテクノロジーの所有権はアルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17に移ることを提案する協定TR-2を送信する」
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah's blessings! Let us rejoice, for the probability in which the archeotech was lost has passed! The outcome is recognised as most favourable. Transmitting a proposal for cooperation pact TR-2, in accordance with which possession of the sacred archeotech will pass to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: 「オムニシアの祝福あれ！アーケオテクノロジーが失われた可能性は過ぎ去った。この結果、最も有利な結果となった。聖なるアーケオテクノロジーの所有権はアルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17に移ることを提案する協定TR-2を送信する。」

languages.text: «¡Por la bendición del Omnissiah! ¡Regocijémonos, pues la probabilidad en la que se perdía la arqueotecnología ha sido evitada! El resultado queda reconocido como muy favorable. Transmitiendo propuesta de pacto de cooperación CI-2, según el que la arqueotecnología sagrada pasará a manos de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17».
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah's blessings! Let us rejoice, for the probability in which the archeotech was lost has passed! The outcome is recognised as most favourable. Transmitting a proposal for cooperation pact TR-2, in accordance with which possession of the sacred archeotech will pass to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: «¡Por la bendición del Omnissiah! ¡Regocijémonos, pues la probabilidad en la que se perdía la arqueotecnología ha sido evitada! El resultado queda reconocido como muy favorable. Transmitiendo propuesta de pacto de cooperación CI-2, según el que la arqueotecnología sagrada pasará a manos de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17».

languages.text: "Segen des Omnissia! Frohlocket, denn die Wahrscheinlichkeit des Verlustes der Archäotech ist gebannt! Das Ergebnis wird als ausgesprochen segensreich bewertet." Übertrage ein Angebot für Kooperationspakt TR-2 zur Überführung der heiligen Archäotech in den Besitz von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah's blessings! Let us rejoice, for the probability in which the archeotech was lost has passed! The outcome is recognised as most favourable. Transmitting a proposal for cooperation pact TR-2, in accordance with which possession of the sacred archeotech will pass to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: "Segen des Omnissia! Frohlocket, denn die Wahrscheinlichkeit des Verlustes der Archäotech ist gebannt! Das Ergebnis wird als ausgesprochen segensreich bewertet." Übertrage ein Angebot für Kooperationspakt TR-2 zur Überführung der heiligen Archäotech in den Besitz von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

languages.text: « L'Omnimessie soit loué ! Réjouissons-nous ! La probabilité de la disparition de l'archéotechnologie est à présent nulle ! Le résultat est désormais jugé extrêmement favorable. Transmission en cours d'un pacte de coopération de type TR-2, visant à établir le transfert de l'archéotechnologie sacrée à destination d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. »
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah's blessings! Let us rejoice, for the probability in which the archeotech was lost has passed! The outcome is recognised as most favourable. Transmitting a proposal for cooperation pact TR-2, in accordance with which possession of the sacred archeotech will pass to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: « L'Omnimessie soit loué ! Réjouissons-nous ! La probabilité de la disparition de l'archéotechnologie est à présent nulle ! Le résultat est désormais jugé extrêmement favorable. Transmission en cours d'un pacte de coopération de type TR-2, visant à établir le transfert de l'archéotechnologie sacrée à destination d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. »

languages.text: “欧姆尼赛亚赐福！欢庆吧，远古科技遗失的概率已被否定！此结果被判定为极其有利。现按TR-2合作协定条款传输提案：根据该提案，神圣远古科技的所有权将移交至卡利西斯祭坛17号。”
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah's blessings! Let us rejoice, for the probability in which the archeotech was lost has passed! The outcome is recognised as most favourable. Transmitting a proposal for cooperation pact TR-2, in accordance with which possession of the sacred archeotech will pass to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: “欧姆尼赛亚赐福！欢庆吧，远古科技遗失的概率已被否定！此结果被判定为极其有利。现按TR-2合作协定条款传输提案：根据该提案，神圣远古科技的所有权将移交至卡利西斯祭坛17号。”

languages.text: "Hermesih sizi kutlasın! Arkeotekin kaybolduğu olasılığı geride bıraktık, sevinelim! Elde edilen sonucun olası en olumlu sonuç olduğu tanımlandı. Kutsal arkeotek mülkiyetinin Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye geçmesini öngören TR-2 iş birliği paktı teklifi iletiliyor."
languages.original_text: "Omnissiah's blessings! Let us rejoice, for the probability in which the archeotech was lost has passed! The outcome is recognised as most favourable.
